channel.title: Indian Stock Market Sentiment
channel.description: Automated sentiment analysis of Indian stock market news and Reddit discussions.

item.title: Market Sentiment: Bullish (65.89/100)
item.description: Overall Market Sentiment based on 50 sources. Aggregated Score: 65.89/100. Category: Bullish. Source Breakdown: Google News: 50 articles
item.content:encoded:
Overall Market Sentiment based on 50 sources.
Aggregated Score: 65.89/100
Category: Bullish
